meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to use project management and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to eliminate debugging bottlenecks and ship client projects faster.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't a code problem; it's a project management failure. By structuring your development workflow into atomic, verifiable units using Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for iterative execution, you isolate logic errors instantly, turning hours of aimless troubleshooting into minutes of precision deployment.
content.intro:
The screen glows at 3:00 AM. You are staring at a stack trace that makes no sense, your client is expecting a demo in six hours, and the codebase feels like a house of cards. You are not just 'stuck'; you are losing billable time and professional credibility because your development process lacks the structural integrity to handle complexity.

Great freelancers don't debug harder; they debug smarter by treating every feature as a managed project. By integrating AI-driven oversight into your workflow, you transform the chaotic 'hunt for the error' into a predictable, repeatable assembly line. It is time to stop guessing and start engineering.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the data flow to identify where logic breaks. This prevents debugging by design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the proposed feature requirements and generate a technical architecture document. Identify potential failure points and data validation needs.

steps.title: Atomic Task Decomposition
steps.description: Break the project into isolated, testable modules to ensure that if a bug appears, you know exactly which module is the culprit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose this feature into 5-minute actionable coding tasks. Focus on single-responsibility modules.

steps.title: Automated Test Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate unit tests before implementation to establish a safety net that catches bugs during the build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest tests for the following module logic, covering edge cases and potential null pointer exceptions.

steps.title: Iterative Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to implement one module at a time, running tests after every single function definition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the authentication service module following the generated architecture. Ensure every function is documented and unit-tested.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: When a bug occurs, feed the error logs back into the system to perform a structured diagnostic report.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these error logs and the associated module code. Identify the root cause and provide a fix that maintains architectural integrity.

pro_tips: Never debug directly in the main branch; create a 'sandbox' branch for every AI-generated fix to maintain stability.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store common error patterns, so the AI learns your coding style and typical mistakes.
Always require the AI to explain the 'Why' behind a bug, not just the 'How' to fix it, to build your own technical intuition.
Treat your logs as documentation; if a bug is hard to find, improve your logging visibility before attempting a code patch.
Standardize your project structure across all clients; this allows your AI tools to gain context faster and reduce 'hallucination' errors.
content.next_steps: Apply this workflow to your next client project and track your 'Time to Fix' metric. Once you master the modular approach, begin building your own library of reusable AI prompts to automate your boilerplate.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business with a process that actually works. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
